name: Varianza
description: Calcula la varianza muestral de un conjunto de datos.
seo_description: Calcula la varianza muestral de un conjunto de datos. Gratis, rápida y sin registro.
example_label: Find the variance of the dataset: 8.2, 10.5, 9.8, 11.3, 7.9, 10.1.
result_context: The variance {variance} measures how spread out the data is from the mean {mean}.
steps: Find each deviation squared and sum
Divide sum by (n-1)=5 to get variance
mistakes: Using population variance (÷n) instead of sample variance (÷n-1)
Confusing variance with standard deviation (variance is squared)
